name: Carmen
title: Monastir Knights
description: Self Toughness Fixed DMG temporarily increases by 1 on attack.

novaBurst.attackDesc: Temporarily deals 1 more Toughness Fixed DMG on attack and grants self Rule of Monastir for 1 turn after attacking.

skills.name: Knights Standard Swordsmanship
skills.description: Attacks the enemy with a heavy spinning slash. Grants self 1 stack of Chill. Damage is proportional to self Max HP.

skills.name: Shock Therapy
skills.description: Charges forward with a strengthened shield to strike the enemy. Grants self Rule of Monastir for 2 turns, and inflicts the enemy with Taunt for 1 turn with a 75% chance. DMG is proportional to self Max HP.

levels.description: Charges forward with a strengthened shield to strike the enemy. Grants self Rule of Monastir for 2 turns, and inflicts the enemy with Taunt for 1 turn with a 75% chance. DMG is proportional to self Max HP.

seEffects.buffDesc: Forcibly uses a Basic Skill on the unit that inflicted Taunt at the start of the turn.

uniquePotentials.name: Composed Response
uniquePotentials.description: Counterattacks with a 25% chance when attacked by an enemy if self has Rule of Monastir, and counterattacks with a 100% chance when attacked by an enemy affected by Taunt.
